title: Star Wars Annual Featuring Ewoks
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{ComicMagazine |image=[[File:Mvswewoksannual85.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Annual
Featuring Ewoks'' |publisher=*[[Marvel Comics]] *[[Grandreams]] |release date=[[July]] [[1985]]''A Galaxy Far, Far Away: Exploring Star Wars Comics'' |pages= |isbn=9780862273408 |issn= |issue= |series=[[Star Wars (Marvel UK)|''Star Wars'' (Marvel UK)]] |prev=[[Return of the Jedi Annual 1984|''Return of the Jedi Annual'' 1984]] |next=''[[Ewoks Annual]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Annual Featuring Ewoks''''', or simply '''''Star Wars Annual''''', is a [[Star Wars (Marvel UK)|''Star Wars'']] book that collects the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]] [[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' (1985) 1]] and [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 3|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 3]]. It was published in hardcover by [[Marvel Comics]], in association with [[Grandreams]], in [[1985]]. ==Contents== *[[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' (1985) 1]] *[[Star Wars Annual (1977) 3|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 3]] ==Media== ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9780862273408}}; [[1985]]; [[Marvel Comics]]/[[Grandreams]]; UK hardcover ==Sources== *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-in-the-uk-star-wars-comic-book-annuals|text=''Star Wars'' in the UK: ''Star Wars'' Comic Book Annuals}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: წელიწდეული ევოკებით }} [[Category:Marvel UK specials and annuals]]
